title: Frozen Multicolor Pens 6-in-1 Retractable Ballpoint Pens Rainbow 6 Colors Barrel Ballpoint Novelty Pen for Kids Office School Supplies Students Children Disney Gift 3+ Years
features: MULTI COLOUR FROZEN PEN SET: Enjoy 6 vibrant ink colours in one Frozen-themed retractable ballpoint pen – Black, Blue, Red, Orange, Green, and Purple. Perfect for kids’ writing, drawing, and note taking. A must-have addition to Frozen stationery collections and school supplies.

SMOOTH WRITING & FINE TIP DESIGN: Our 0.5mm fine tip ensures clean, precise lines with every stroke. The colourful gel ink flows effortlessly, ideal for journaling, homework, and creative doodles. A smooth-writing pen for everyday use at school or office. Gel Pen: 16cm x 2cm (LxW).

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of sturdy PVC plastic with a durable metal spring, this retractable ball pen offers a comfortable grip and long-lasting performance. Non-clogging and mess-free ink design keeps your writing clear and neat.

COMPACT & FUN RETRACTABLE DESIGN: Switch colours with one click! The easy push mechanism lets you change inks instantly. Compact and portable design makes it a fun pen for kids, students, and Frozen fans – great for study desks, pencil cases, and on-the-go writing.

PERFECT GIFT FOR GIRLS & STUDENTS: A cute and practical Frozen pen that makes a wonderful birthday gift, party bag filler, or Christmas stocking stuffer. Ideal for school children, stationery lovers, and fans of Disney Frozen characters like Elsa and Anna.
description: SPECIFICATIONS:- Colour: Multicolour Character: FROZEN 2 Material: Plastic & Metal Each Pen: 16 x 2 cm (LxW) Quantity: 1 Piece FEATURES:- Completely safe and smooth writing. Stylish colourful kid's favourite ball pen for school kids. Let your creativity speak with this multicoloured pen. Best for gifting on birthday gift, party gift and return gifts. Lightweight, portable use & easy to carry outdoor for kids. The pen is easy to hold with little hands, great as gifts for pens. 6 colours refills encased in a round pen barrel for comfortable grip. Good school supplies for high school and gifts for nursing student. Retractable colour ballpoint pen works great for art projects & regular use as well. Ballpoint pen can highlight or colour code key point in text with different colors. SATISFACTION GUARANTEED Your satisfaction is our first priority, customer service always stand by for you to provide 100% satisfied service. If you are not happy with these product for any reason feel free to contact us.
